narrative:
Jackson B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 396 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
